name: article-engine
description: Portable, project-agnostic article generation engine v4.6. Generates full standalone HTML article pages from minimal input by adapting to any website's design system. Features: first-time setup gate (interactive Gemini MCP configuration on first use with skip option), built-in structural component registry (170+ proven blueprints carried internally — no external component file needed at runtime), runtime visual adaptation to any project's design tokens, domain integrity enforcement, multi-round research via Gemini MCP, portable Gemini image generation with flexible tool resolver, 4-6 images per article, graceful fallback, sidebar table of contents, visual trust layer, fully automatic section editing via bridge server (browser edit UI sends edits directly to Claude Code — no manual copy-paste, with clipboard + /apply-edit command as fallback), topic-aware composition, and three adaptation modes (existing/registry/fallback). Works on any project.
